KXUSLCUPGAME-26JUL11SARMIA-MIA.rules_primary: If Miami wins the Sarasota Paradise vs Miami professional USL Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 11, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
